## 📋 Summary

Describe the big picture of your changes here to communicate why we should accept this pull request.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Fixes #(issue)

## ✅ Changes Made

- [ ] Feature added / Bug fixed
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] Documentation updated

## 🧪 Testing

How did you test your changes? What commands should reviewers run?

```bash
# Example:
pytest tests/ -v -k "your_test"
```

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## 🔍 Quality Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style (Black + Ruff)
- [ ] Type hints are added for all public functions
- [ ] Tests pass: `make test`
- [ ] Linting passes: `make lint`
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guide

## ℹ️ Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here.
